channel.title: fitgreenmind TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from fitgreenmind

item.title: I guess my spark came back 🥹👉👈 #glowup #healthjourney
item.description: I guess my spark came back 🥹👉👈 #glowup #healthjourney

item.title: This was wONEders 🥘 8 recipes made in one pan, pot or tray! From Köfte over bibimbap to loaded potatoes… there was something for everyone! And know I wanna know: which recipe series do you wanna see next? (I’ll pick the top comment)😉👇 - Das war wONEders
item.description: This was wONEders 🥘 8 recipes made in one pan, pot or tray! From Köfte over bibimbap to loaded potatoes… there was something for everyone! And know I wanna know: which recipe series do you wanna see next? (I’ll pick the top comment)😉👇 - Das war wONEders

item.title: (Werbung) Better Than Beef JETZT in der @ardmediathek ansehen! 🥳 Mein Streamingformat, das in Zusammenarbeit mit dem Saarländischen Rundfunk und der @ardmediathek entstanden ist, könnt ihr JETZT KOSTENLOS anschauen… Darin reise ich nach Mallorca und stel

item.title: (Werbung) Fleischbällchen OHNE FLEISCH?! 🍖 Das konnte mir René Adler auch nicht ganz glauben…👀 Mit diesen Albondigas hab ich versucht ihn in meinem Streamingformat “better than beef” zu überzeugen und ob es geklappt hat könnt ihr euch JETZT in der @ARD M

item.title: MAPO TOFU UDON 🍜 I’ve been seeing these viral noodles EVERYWHERE and I’m not gonna lie I was a bit skeptical… 🤨 So I made this vegan version and I have to admit, they’re really that good (and made in no time!)😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time) -150g
item.description: MAPO TOFU UDON 🍜 I’ve been seeing these viral noodles EVERYWHERE and I’m not gonna lie I was a bit skeptical… 🤨 So I made this vegan version and I have to admit, they’re really that good (and made in no time!)😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time) -150g

item.title: (Werbung) Calamar vom Land?! 🌊 Da wurde @reneadler auch ganz stutzig…🤯 Diese Zucchini war mein Versuch veganen Calamar in meinem Streamingformat “better than beef” zu machen, ob es mir gelungen ist könnt ihr euch JETZT in der @ARD Mediathek anschauen! 🍿 👩
item.description: (Werbung) Calamar vom Land?! 🌊 Da wurde @reneadler auch ganz stutzig…🤯 Diese Zucchini war mein Versuch veganen Calamar in meinem Streamingformat “better than beef” zu machen, ob es mir gelungen ist könnt ihr euch JETZT in der @ARD Mediathek anschauen! 🍿 👩

item.title: (Werbung) Your little reminder to never stop believing in yourself and your mission! 🫶 Den Film “better than beef” könnt ihr euch übrigens in der ARD Mediathek anschauen! 🥹#inspiration #motivation #veganfood

item.title: TOUVLAKI 🥙 or tofu souvlaki? 👀 Whatever you wanna call it, this dish shows once again: tofu is not boring, the way you prepare is! 😉 RECIPE (3 servings, 1h prep time): -400g firm tofu Tear in chunks. Marinade: -4 Tbsp vegan yogurt (unsweetened) -juice of
item.description: TOUVLAKI 🥙 or tofu souvlaki? 👀 Whatever you wanna call it, this dish shows once again: tofu is not boring, the way you prepare is! 😉 RECIPE (3 servings, 1h prep time): -400g firm tofu Tear in chunks. Marinade: -4 Tbsp vegan yogurt (unsweetened) -juice of

item.title: I must’ve eaten the wrong tofu then…🥲 #foodrok #fun #tofu #meme
item.description: I must’ve eaten the wrong tofu then…🥲 #foodrok #fun #tofu #meme

item.title: YOGURT “BAGELS” 🥯 Yes these are not traditional bagels BUT a very delicious, quick solution for when you crave some but don’t have the time.😋 RECIPE (4 bagels, 35min prep time): -350g flour -1 tbsp baking powder -salt to taste -220g unsweetened vegan yo
item.description: YOGURT “BAGELS” 🥯 Yes these are not traditional bagels BUT a very delicious, quick solution for when you crave some but don’t have the time.😋 RECIPE (4 bagels, 35min prep time): -350g flour -1 tbsp baking powder -salt to taste -220g unsweetened vegan yo

item.title: I hope to see you there! The first 50 people get a goodie bag…👀 Koro Café Berlin Mitte Thursday to Saturday 9:30 to 6:30pm #popupcafé #café #caféowner #vegancafé

item.title: The best way to prepare tofu? Shredding it! 😋 I promise you EVERYONE will like tofu, if you prepare it like this! 👇 RECIPE (2-3 servings, 35min prep time): -200g firm tofu Shred using a grater. -1 tbsp soy sauce -1 Tsp chicken spice (or your favorite spic
item.description: The best way to prepare tofu? Shredding it! 😋 I promise you EVERYONE will like tofu, if you prepare it like this! 👇 RECIPE (2-3 servings, 35min prep time): -200g firm tofu Shred using a grater. -1 tbsp soy sauce -1 Tsp chicken spice (or your favorite spic

item.title: HORCHATA 🇲🇽 It’s a Mexican agua fresca and perfect for Spring and summer summer! Honestly my favorite drink ever.😋 RECIPE (12 servings) -1 cup (200g) rice -4 cups (1L) water -2 sticks cinnamon Let it soak overnight. Blend 4mins. Strain until you have a “
item.description: HORCHATA 🇲🇽 It’s a Mexican agua fresca and perfect for Spring and summer summer! Honestly my favorite drink ever.😋 RECIPE (12 servings) -1 cup (200g) rice -4 cups (1L) water -2 sticks cinnamon Let it soak overnight. Blend 4mins. Strain until you have a “

item.title: SMASHED DUMPLING WRAP 🌯 I love dumplings but I’m always too lazy to make them, so this is my quick “cheat’s” version for you! 😉 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time): Quick slaw: -1/2 small cabbage -1 carrot -a handful cilantro Cut in slices/julienne. -1T
item.description: SMASHED DUMPLING WRAP 🌯 I love dumplings but I’m always too lazy to make them, so this is my quick “cheat’s” version for you! 😉 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time): Quick slaw: -1/2 small cabbage -1 carrot -a handful cilantro Cut in slices/julienne. -1T

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) STULLEN AROUND THE WORLD 🗺️ 🥪 pt. 3: chickpea sandwich Ich wurde mit meinem Stullengewürz von @sebastiancopien nach Indien geschickt… dabei kam dieser Gaumenschmaus raus!🤭 Hier ist das Rezept und falls ihr wissen wollt wohin ich Sebastian mi

item.title: From now on I’m only gonna post videos like this because they get more views. 🤷‍♀️ RECIPE (2 servings, 45min prep time): Pasta: -250g flour -a good pinch of salt -125 to 140ml water Knead well for 5mins. Set the dough aside for at least 30mins. Roll out
item.description: From now on I’m only gonna post videos like this because they get more views. 🤷‍♀️ RECIPE (2 servings, 45min prep time): Pasta: -250g flour -a good pinch of salt -125 to 140ml water Knead well for 5mins. Set the dough aside for at least 30mins. Roll out

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) Wer hat schon “Better than Beef” in der @ardmediathek geschaut? 👀 (solltet ihr auf jeden Fall 😉) FALLS es eine zweite Folge geben sollte… für wen würdet ihr mich gerne vegan kochen sehen?👀 👇

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) I opened my first café!😱 Thanks to @KoRo for letting me move in for 3 days and thanks to EVERYONE who was there! 🤗 In which city should I open a café next? 😋👇 My @koro code: Fitgreenmind 🤝 - Ich hab mein erstes Café eröffnet… und so ist’s ge
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) I opened my first café!😱 Thanks to @KoRo for letting me move in for 3 days and thanks to EVERYONE who was there! 🤗 In which city should I open a café next? 😋👇 My @koro code: Fitgreenmind 🤝 - Ich hab mein erstes Café eröffnet… und so ist’s ge

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) BIG NEWS! 🥳 Watch my movie in the @ARD Mediathek WITH English subtitles NOW! 😍 I tried to veganize @reneadler s favorite tapas in Mallorca… it was a challenge and maybeee I mastered it (but maybe I didn’t).👀 🍿 Better than Beef 🎥 in the @ardme
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) BIG NEWS! 🥳 Watch my movie in the @ARD Mediathek WITH English subtitles NOW! 😍 I tried to veganize @reneadler s favorite tapas in Mallorca… it was a challenge and maybeee I mastered it (but maybe I didn’t).👀 🍿 Better than Beef 🎥 in the @ardme

item.title: MANGO STICKY OATS 🥭 This is an ode to Khao Niew Mamuang aka mango sticky rice… I love it SOOO much and this breakfast version tastes ALMOST like the original. 😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time): Base: -1/4 cup (30-40g) oats (or I used spelt flakes) -
item.description: MANGO STICKY OATS 🥭 This is an ode to Khao Niew Mamuang aka mango sticky rice… I love it SOOO much and this breakfast version tastes ALMOST like the original. 😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time): Base: -1/4 cup (30-40g) oats (or I used spelt flakes) -
